message:
fix(fnx-algorithms): wire test_dijkstra module into lib.rs

br-r37-c1-btmc5 follow-up: a92e4f45 converted
crates/fnx-algorithms/src/test_dijkstra.rs from a debug-print
scratchpad into a real regression test, but the file was never
referenced from lib.rs, so the test never compiled and the
assertion never ran. Wire it into the module tree under #[cfg(test)]
so cargo test --package fnx-algorithms picks it up alongside the
existing in-crate tests module.

Add a brief comment at the wire-up site explaining the historical
context (debug scratchpad that was sloppily checked in with
assert!(false), now a real test) so a future reader doesn't wonder
why this single file lives outside the inline `mod tests { ... }`
block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
